name: Natural Grocers by Vitamin Cottage, Inc.
business: Natural Grocers is an expanding specialty retailer of natural and organic groceries and dietary supplements. We focus on providing high-quality products at affordable prices, exceptional customer service, nutrition education and community outreach.

exposures.sentence: Natural Grocers is an expanding specialty retailer of natural and organic groceries and dietary supplements.
As of September 30, 2025, in partnership with a third party, we offered online ordering, with home delivery services at 164 of our stores and pickup services at 17 of our stores.

In June 2025, UNFI experienced a cybersecurity incident that temporarily impacted its ability to fulfill orders and distribute products to our stores, resulting in product shortages in June and July 2025.

catalysts.event: Open six to eight new stores in fiscal year 2026
catalysts.sentence: We plan to open six to eight new stores in fiscal year 2026, none of which opened during the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 prior to the filing of this Form 10-K.

catalysts.event: Increase quarterly dividend to $0.15 per share
catalysts.sentence: On November 19, 2025, our Board approved the payment of a quarterly cash dividend of $0.15 per share of common stock, which was paid on December 10, 2025 to stockholders of record as of the close of business on December 1, 2025.

catalysts.event: Capital expenditures of $50-55 million in fiscal year 2026
catalysts.sentence: We plan to spend approximately $50.0 million to $55.0 million on capital expenditures during fiscal year 2026 primarily in connection with expected new store openings and store relocations/remodels.

catalysts.event: Extension of UNFI distribution agreement through September 2028
catalysts.sentence: In August 2023, we extended our long-term relationship with UNFI as our primary supplier of products in the natural, fresh and produce categories through September 3, 2028, subject to automatic renewals for successive one-year periods unless otherwise terminated by either party.
